title: Listening, Improving, Evolving
message:
Dear Viumo User,

We’ve been listening closely to your experience and working behind the scenes to make Viumo smoother, faster, and more reliable for everyone.

As part of these improvements, you may notice refinements in playback, smarter download management, and overall performance optimization across the app. These changes are designed to keep Viumo responsive and fair as our community continues to grow.

Coming next: personalized downloads, user profiles and sign-in, and continued player enhancements to give you a better streaming experience on every device.

Thank you for being part of Viumo’s journey. Your feedback helps shape what Viumo becomes.
